case_title: ZLOT, HAROLD S. et al VS LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT CO. LLC

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT FILED "LATE" REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. ($10.00 PAID BY CASH) COMMISSIONER TO SIGN ORDER.
AS PER ORDER OF THE COURT CLERK NOTIFIED PARTIES OF CONTINUANCE TO 5/11/07 AT 1:30 P.M. WITH EXCEPTION OF MARTIN GANS-INCORRECT NUMBER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-01-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-11-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 THE COURT GRANTS LEAVE TO FILE LATE REQUEST FOR CONTINUNCE. CLERK SHALL NOTIFY PARTIES IMMEDIATELY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-11-2007, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAY-30-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-26-2007, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-29-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,226.37 FILED BY ZLOT, HAROLD S. GANS, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT CO. LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; PAID $10 FEE; TO FOLDER/TRAY.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM THE PLTF, REGARDING CONTINUANCES REQUESTED BY DEFT AND KEEPING THE JULY 26TH COURT DATE.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PARTIES NOTIFIED BY TELEPHONE OF THE CONTINUANCE DATE. NOTICE MAILED OUT TO PARTIES.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT CO. LLC
PLTF'S REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT OF HRG. ORDER SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER. $10.00 FEE PAID.
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST "DENIED".ACTION ORDERED OFF-CALENDAR. PLTF MAY REQUEST FOR TRIAL AT A DATE & TIME CONVENIENT TO THE PARTIES. COPIES MAILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-30-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-21-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CASE RESTORED TO CALENDAR BY COURT PER MAY 17, 2007, ORDER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-29-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-02-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PER AGREEMENT OF PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT CO. LLC
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING, FILED. $10.00 FEE PAID.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE HEARING DATE SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR APPROVAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-21-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-26-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE.
ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT RETURNED. ONLY ONE CREDITOR SIGNED.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING- ADVANCING COURT DATE TO AGREED UPON DATE OF JUNE 21, 2007, @ 1:30PM. MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT WAS SUBMITTED WITH ORDER FOR COMMISSIONER'S APPROVAL. $10.00 FEE PAID, 3RD REQUEST.
COPIES OF THE CONTO DATE SENT TO THE PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZLOT, HAROLD S. GANS, MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIQUID REALTY MANAGEMENT CO. LLC $4,517.54 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,667.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
